use_retrieval_when: unsafe myth or home remedy request
medicine, injection, dose, or shop pressure
public-health, milk/meat safety, carcass, bite, or outbreak concern
user explicitly asks for source-backed guidance
routing_policy.reason: Keep normal answers natural with CPT, but use offline knowledge when safety, grounding, or escalation matters.

recommended_modes.fallback: keyword/BM25 over chunk text and aliases
recommended_modes.phone_safe: BM25 plus optional small multilingual embeddings
recommended_modes.demo_plus: hybrid retrieval with optional reranking over top 5

rendering_rules: Never dump full chunks; render only the most relevant lines.
Green/general CPT-only queries should not retrieve unless source-backed answer is requested.
Green answers should not include unrelated red warnings.
Protected safety triggers must include the relevant safety rule.
If support is weak, ask one critical follow-up instead of inventing a diagnosis.
